title: aster panduratus
intro: Aster panduratus, also known as White Panophyllum or White Panophyllum Aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Aster panduratus are attributed to its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aster panduratus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Aster panduratus typically involve infusions of the roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in tinctures and decoctions.
